MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/good cause. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Amended Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Emi Gusukuma, Esq., for defendant and moving party: RICARDO PIMIENTA, BERTHA JIMENEZ and ALEX TSE
John F. Henning, Jr., Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: GORMAN PIPELINE, INC.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. DEFENDANT RICARDO PIMIENTA, BERTHA JIMENEZ and ALEX TSE's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff's counsel in the amount of $775, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Amended Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Emi Gusukuma, Esq., for defendant and moving party: RICARDO PIMIENTA, BERTHA JIMENEZ and ALEX TSE
John F. Henning, Jr., Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: GORMAN PIPELINE, INC.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. DEFENDANT RICARDO PIMIENTA, BERTHA JIMENEZ and ALEX TSE's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions is denied. The notice of motion seeks an order regarding Plaintiff Louise Peirona. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
